summary: The audit for https://moveroo.com.au/privacy-policy scored 96/100. Below is the list of issues requiring attention.

issues.remediation: Add article:modified_time meta tag or include dateModified in your Schema.org markup.
Ensure you use headings in order (H1 -> H2 -> H3). Don't skip levels.
Add author bylines with links to author bio pages. Use schema.org/Person markup for best results.

issues.issue_detected: Reading score: 35 (College level) - may be too difficult
issues.remediation: Simplify sentences, use shorter words, and break up complex paragraphs. Aim for a score of 60+.

issues.issue_detected: OG image found but dimensions could not be verified
issues.remediation: Ensure og:image is accessible and at least 1200x630.
Audit your third-party scripts. Remove unused ones and defer others.
If this page represents a product or local business, add `aggregateRating` schema to be eligible for star snippets.

issues.issue_detected: FAQ content detected (2 Q&A pairs) - add FAQPage schema
issues.remediation: Add structured data to get rich snippets in search results.
Rephrase some of your subheadings as questions that your content answers (e.g., "Why choose us?" instead of "Benefits").
